title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Luffy, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Looks like someone dangerous showed up...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Zehahahaha!! Yeah, that's right!! Who're you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Break through!! They've got nothing left!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Dammit!! Their numbers are still increasing !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Christ!! How do we stop these guys!!!?

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Luffy, Magellan, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.
